name: haven
description: Your new Voice, Video and Chat application to connect with your friends!
author: Cloudly <haven@becloudly.eu>

scripts.check:full: bun run lint && bun run typecheck
scripts.package:win: node ./scripts/prepare-release-dir.mjs && bun run typecheck && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && tauri build --bundles nsis && node ./scripts/collect-tauri-bundles.mjs win32
scripts.package:mac: node ./scripts/prepare-release-dir.mjs && bun run typecheck && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && tauri build --bundles dmg,app && node ./scripts/collect-tauri-bundles.mjs darwin
scripts.package:linux: node ./scripts/prepare-release-dir.mjs && bun run typecheck && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && tauri build --bundles appimage,deb && node ./scripts/collect-tauri-bundles.mjs linux
